indexes.name: artifacts_identity_uidx
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX artifacts_identity_uidx ON public.artifacts USING btree (edition_id, tipo, storage_path)

indexes.name: artifacts_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX artifacts_pkey ON public.artifacts USING btree (id)

indexes.name: editions_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX editions_pkey ON public.editions USING btree (id)

indexes.name: editions_project_id_idioma_key
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX editions_project_id_idioma_key ON public.editions USING btree (project_id, idioma)

indexes.name: jobs_one_queued_per_project_tipo_uidx
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX jobs_one_queued_per_project_tipo_uidx ON public.jobs USING btree (owner, project_id, tipo) WHERE ((status = 'queued'::text) AND (project_id IS NOT NULL))

indexes.name: jobs_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX jobs_pkey ON public.jobs USING btree (id)

indexes.name: jobs_queue_idx
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX jobs_queue_idx ON public.jobs USING btree (status, created_at)

triggers.name: editions_guard_pronto
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER editions_guard_pronto BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF status ON public.editions FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION guard_edition_pronto()

triggers.name: trg_editions_updated
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER trg_editions_updated BEFORE UPDATE ON public.editions FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()

functions.name: claim_job
guard_edition_pronto
promote_publication
